name: osplus-sidecar

scripts.build: npm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath, 'OSPlus.exe')" && npx postject OSPlus.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 --overwrite

description: OSPlus sidecar — bridges Lua mod to OSPlus relay server via WebSocket
